text:
Strange device type "Uninstalled" adn speed "0KB/s" in dmesg

aac0: <Adaptec SCSI RAID 2230S> mem 0xdd600000-0xdd7fffff,0xdd400000-0xdd400fff irq 72 at device 3.0 on pci8
aac0: Enabling 64-bit address support
aac0: Enable Raw I/O
aac0: Enable 64-bit array
aac0: New comm. interface enabled
aac0: [ITHREAD]
aac0: Adaptec 2230S, aac driver 2.1.9-1
aacp0: <SCSI Passthrough Bus> on aac0
aacp1: <SCSI Passthrough Bus> on aac0

--- skipped other stuff ------

pass0 at aacp0 bus 0 scbus0 target 0 lun 0
pass0: <HITACHI HUS151473VL3800 S3BA> Fixed Uninstalled SCSI-3 device 
pass0: 0KB/s transfers
pass1 at aacp0 bus 0 scbus0 target 1 lun 0
pass1: <HITACHI HUS103073FL3800 SA1B> Fixed Uninstalled SCSI-3 device 
pass1: 0KB/s transfers
